name: Claude Plugin Importer
description: Imports Claude Code plugins and marketplaces from GitHub or Git repositories at deploy time, then normalizes their skills, commands, agents, hooks, MCP/LSP descriptors, monitors, themes, settings, and bin tools for Shadow Cloud agents.

fields.label: GitHub Token
fields.description: Optional token for private GitHub plugin repositories

marketplaces.description: Claude Code plugin marketplaces to import from GitHub or Git repositories.

id.description: Stable source id for labels and logs.

url.description: Full git URL, owner/repo shorthand, or GitHub tree URL.

path.description: Marketplace root path inside the repository.

marketplacePath.description: Path to .claude-plugin/marketplace.json relative to path or repo root.

plugins.description: Marketplace plugin names to import. Omit to import all entries.
Direct Claude plugin directories or plugin-collection directories to import.

id.description: Stable source id for labels and logs.

url.description: Full git URL, owner/repo shorthand, or GitHub tree URL.

path.description: Plugin directory or collection directory inside the repository.

plugins.description: Plugin directory names or manifest names to import when path points at a collection.

mountPath.description: Container path where imported Claude plugin assets are mounted.

poll.description: Optional poll interval (e.g. 5m, 30s, 1h) for live refresh sidecar.

slashCommands.description: Controls automatic Shadow slash command registration for imported Claude commands and skills.

autoRegister.description: Register discovered upstream commands with Shadow.

inferInteractions.description: Derive form interactions from upstream AskUserQuestion-style markdown.

includeScripts.description: Register executable helper scripts from imported script directories as slash commands.

generateScriptSkills.description: Generate lightweight SKILL.md wrappers for discovered helper scripts.

maxScriptCommandsPerPack.description: Maximum number of script-backed commands to expose per imported plugin.

rules.description: Optional command match rules for aliases or explicit interaction metadata.
